name: typedclojure-lsp
description: Typed Clojure type checking in your editor via LSP

typedclojure-lsp.version.description: Version of typedclojure-lsp to use from Clojars (e.g. "0.1.106" or "RELEASE" for latest)

typedclojure-lsp.path.description: Path to a local typedclojure-lsp checkout for development. Overrides the version setting when set.
